_comment.sam_active: SAM.gov registration Active (federal eligibility). TRUE since 2026-07-17: registration Active under Continental Silverline Products, LLC (UEI XF73FG8CVMX1). Gates all federal/SAM buys (see win_score.py + readiness.py).
_comment.cfr_1633: Can certify finished mattresses to 16 CFR Part 1633 open-flame flammability (required for institutional/correctional specs).
_comment.cal_tb_117: Can meet California Technical Bulletin 117 (TB 117) flammability where specified.
_comment.fr_fluid_proof_covers: Can supply fire-retardant / fluid-proof mattress covers (correctional / med-surg requirement).
_comment.gpo_eligibility: GPO / co-op award eligibility by vehicle. true = we can sell under that vehicle. E&I is registered/complete; the rest are not yet eligible.
_comment.bonding: Can post payment/performance bonds when a solicitation requires bonding. Currently false.
_comment.brand_authorizations: Brands we are authorized to supply against a brand-name/sole-source spec. A spec naming a brand NOT in this list is an eligibility blocker.
